title: Shoplifting offences
description: Police-recorded shoplifting, England & Wales, per year
producer: ONS / Home Office police-recorded crime (Crime in England & Wales appendix tables)
measure: Police-recorded shoplifting, England & Wales, per year

provenance.source: ONS / Home Office police-recorded crime (Crime in England & Wales appendix tables)
provenance.derivation: Direct from source; latest value validated against validRange

qualityDimensions.accuracy: Not asserted by Govviz; upstream producer methodology remains authoritative.
qualityDimensions.completeness: 25 observations emitted in the tidy data file.
qualityDimensions.uniqueness: One observation per period/ref_area key in the emitted tidy table.
qualityDimensions.consistency: Compiled by the same source-specific parser and emitted through one CSVW schema.
qualityDimensions.timeliness: Latest observed period 2025 is within the expected annual cadence; latest source fetch recorded 2026-07-02.
qualityDimensions.validity: Latest source values passed the published validRange 100000 to 1000000.

freshnessReason: Latest observed period 2025 is within the expected annual cadence; latest source fetch recorded 2026-07-02.
limitations: Govviz is a downstream compiler, not the primary publisher.
The primary producer may not publish the same tidy structure, stable id, CSVW metadata, or validation range upstream.
Freshness metadata is inferred from observed periods and fetch timestamps; it is not an official release calendar.
The contact and accountability route remains the primary producer's published route, not a Govviz official statistics contact.
No upstream policy-as-code conformance assertion has been made by the primary producer.
caveat: Police-recorded crime — sensitive to recording-practice changes and reporting rates, and differs from the Crime Survey for England & Wales' victimisation-based estimate.
